visual_description: A man in a dark suit is seated at a desk, holding a cigarette and exhaling smoke while looking forward. Another person in a suit stands partially visible to his right, holding a briefcase. The scene is dimly lit with blue tones, focusing on the man’s face and upper body as he smokes.

The speech is slow and deliberate, with a falling intonation that imparts a sense of warmth and concern.
